creator: wen@FreeBSD.org
text:
- Update to 1.4.1
- Convert to new Makefile format

Fix: 

PORTNAME=      gprolog
-PORTVERSION=   1.4.0
-PORTREVISION=  0
+PORTVERSION=   1.4.1
 CATEGORIES=    lang
 MASTER_SITES=  http://www.gprolog.org/--FI0xYiljdWwaIlEAV2u1aaqdww08N9EbgFAYUI4NU79pBEd5
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"
